content.content:
success ae5ac55 local_agent completed [Tool: Grep] {"pattern":"Avoid using autofocus","path":"/testbed","output_mode":"content","-n":true} [Tool: Grep] {"pattern":"autofocus","path":"/testbed","glob":"**/*.{js,ts,tsx,jsx,md,svelte}","output_mode":"files_with_matches","head_limit":50} [Tool: Grep] {"pattern":"a11y.*autofocus|autofocus.*a11y","path":"/testbed","output_mode":"content","-n":true,"-i":true} [Tool: Grep] {"pattern":"avoid.*autofocus","path":"/testbed","output_mode":"content","-n":true,"-i":true} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/2-analyze/visitors/shared/a11y.js","offset":840,"limit":120} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/src/compiler/warnings.js","offset":130,"limit":70} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-no-autofocus/input.svelte"} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-no-autofocus/warnings.json"} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-not-on-components/input.svelte"} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-not-on-components/warnings.json"} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/test.ts"} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/packages/svelte/messages/compile-warnings/a11y.md","offset":1,"limit":120} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/documentation/docs/98-reference/30-compiler-warnings.md","offset":1,"limit":60} [Tool: Read] {"file_path":"/testbed/documentation/docs/98-reference/30-compiler-warnings.md","offset":1,"limit":60} --- RESULT --- ## Where the warning text comes from (rule definition) The warning is the compiler warning **code** `a11y_autofocus` with message **“Avoid using autofocus”**. **Implementation of the warning message (central registry):** - **File:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/src/compiler/warnings.js` - **Snippet:** ```js /** * Avoid using autofocus * @param {null | NodeLike} node */ export function a11y_autofocus(node) { w(node, 'a11y_autofocus', `Avoid using autofocus\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/a11y_autofocus`); } ``` So the warning’s user-facing message is produced by `warnings.js` via `w(...)` with code `a11y_autofocus`. ## How it’s triggered (a11y analysis pass) The actual *trigger* happens during the compiler analyze phase in the shared a11y visitor: - **File:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/2-analyze/visitors/shared/a11y.js` - **Snippet (rule trigger):** ```js // no-autofocus if (name === 'autofocus') { w.a11y_autofocus(attribute); } ``` Meaning: **any attribute whose normalized `name` is exactly `autofocus`** will produce the warning, and it passes the **attribute node** to the warning function so the compiler can report accurate `start/end` positions. There’s no additional gating logic here (e.g. no “only on certain tags” check in this snippet); it’s simply attribute-name based within the a11y attribute checks. ## Relevant tests (validator samples) This warning is covered by validator fixture tests that compile sample inputs and compare produced warnings to `warnings.json`. ### 1) Basic “no autofocus” fixture - **Input:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-no-autofocus/input.svelte` ```svelte
``` - **Expected warnings:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-no-autofocus/warnings.json` ```json [ { "code": "a11y_autofocus", "message": "Avoid using autofocus", "start": { "line": 1, "column": 5 }, "end": { "line": 1, "column": 14 } } ] ``` ### 2) Autofocus inside a component slot / component usage fixture - **Input:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-not-on-components/input.svelte` ```svelte ``` - **Expected warnings:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-not-on-components/warnings.json` ```json [ { "code": "a11y_autofocus", "message": "Avoid using autofocus", "start": { "column": 8, "line": 6 }, "end": { "line": 6, "column": 17 } } ] ``` ### Test harness that runs these fixtures - **File:** `/testbed/packages/svelte/tests/validator/test.ts` - It loads each sample’s `input.svelte` and compares `warnings` to `warnings.json`, stripping the trailing docs link from the compiler warning message: ```ts warnings.map((w) => ({ code: w.code, message: strip_link(w.message), start: { line: w.start?.line, column: w.start?.column }, end: { line: w.end?.line, column: w.end?.column } })) ``` ## Documentation references (for completeness) - Warning docs entry: `/testbed/packages/svelte/messages/compile-warnings/a11y.md` (section `## a11y_autofocus`) - Aggregated docs: `/testbed/documentation/docs/98-reference/.generated/compile-warnings.md` includes “Avoid using autofocus” - Suppression example: `/testbed/documentation/docs/98-reference/30-compiler-warnings.md` shows `` above ``

input.command:
mkdir -p packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-dialog-autofocus && cat > packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-dialog-autofocus/input.svelte <<'EOF'
<dialog autofocus>
	I'm a dialog
</dialog>
EOF
cat > packages/svelte/tests/validator/samples/a11y-dialog-autofocus/warnings.json <<'EOF'
[]
EOF
input.description: Add validator fixture for dialog autofocus
Run validator tests with new fixture

lines: +    // `autofocus` is generally discouraged because it can be disruptive, but the HTML
+    // spec explicitly recommends it for <dialog> (or its descendants) when opening.

input.description: Re-run validator tests after a11y fix
Run validator tests after removing fixture

content.text: Fixed the incorrect `a11y_autofocus` warning being emitted for `<dialog autofocus>`. - **Root cause:** the a11y analyzer warned on *any* `autofocus` attribute, regardless of element. - **Fix:** in `packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/2-analyze/visitors/shared/a11y.js`, suppress `a11y_autofocus` when the attribute is on a `<dialog>` element (since HTML spec recommends it). - **Test (temporary):** added a validator fixture asserting `<dialog autofocus>` produces no warnings; it failed before the fix and passed after. - **Cleanup:** removed the temporary fixture as requested. - **Validation:** `pnpm -w vitest run packages/svelte/tests/validator/test.ts` passes after cleanup.

trajectory.result: Fixed the incorrect `a11y_autofocus` warning being emitted for `<dialog autofocus>`. - **Root cause:** the a11y analyzer warned on *any* `autofocus` attribute, regardless of element. - **Fix:** in `packages/svelte/src/compiler/phases/2-analyze/visitors/shared/a11y.js`, suppress `a11y_autofocus` when the attribute is on a `<dialog>` element (since HTML spec recommends it). - **Test (temporary):** added a validator fixture asserting `<dialog autofocus>` produces no warnings; it failed before the fix and passed after. - **Cleanup:** removed the temporary fixture as requested. - **Validation:** `pnpm -w vitest run packages/svelte/tests/validator/test.ts` passes after cleanup.
